fields.description:
## Description
Complexity analyzer using lizard (pip dep from the `[metrics]` extra) for real per-function cyclomatic complexity (CCN) across ~25 languages, populating `AnalyzerResult.complexity`.

## Review-driven corrections
- lizard is used AS AN IMPORTED LIBRARY here (via `guard_import(extra="metrics")`), not shelled — `guard_import` raises `OptionalDependencyError`; CATCH it and return `Unavailable(reason, accruing_since)`, not bare ImportError.
- Live in `src/rebar/metrics/analyzers/` (not `adapters/`).
- Uses the interface/AnalyzerResult from 3b30 and the scan root from e7a0; deps are sibling stories.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `analyzers/lizard_complexity.py` runs lizard over the scan root -> per-file/aggregate CCN (optionally token/param counts).
- [ ] Extra not installed -> `OptionalDependencyError` caught -> Unavailable(reason, accruing_since).
- [ ] Exercised on Python + one non-Python fixture (contributes toward the epics cross-language AC).

## Verification
- [ ] Unit over Python + one other language fixture; guard-absent -> Unavailable.

## Dependencies: 3b30, 9597, e7a0 (siblings). Recorded edges: depends_on 9597, e7a0.
## Files likely touched: src/rebar/metrics/analyzers/lizard_complexity.py (new), tests/unit/metrics/test_lizard_complexity.py (new)
## Estimated scope: M
